metaTitle: Somers Pest Control | Same-Day Service | Best Pest NYC
metaDescription: Trusted Somers pest control for homes and businesses. Serving Route 202, Baldwin Place, and Heritage Hills. Same-day service. Call now for a free quote!
introParagraph: The Best Pest Control NYC delivers expert pest elimination services throughout Somers, from the estates along Primrose Street to Heritage Hills and the neighborhoods near Route 202. Our licensed exterminators understand the unique challenges of Somers properties, whether you're dealing with rodents near Reis Park or ants invading homes along Baldwin Road. We offer same-day appointments and proven solutions that protect your family and property year-round.
whyThisAreaSection: Somers' semi-rural character creates significant pest pressure through its blend of wooded areas, older residential properties, and proximity to water sources like the Muscoot Reservoir. The heavily forested landscapes along Route 100 and surrounding conservation areas provide natural wildlife corridors, bringing raccoons, squirrels, and field mice into residential zones. Seasonal temperature swings drive pests indoors during harsh Westchester winters. Properties near commercial areas along Route 202 face constant pest activity from food establishments and retail centers, while aging septic systems in rural sections attract rodents and insects.
propertyTypesSection: Somers features predominantly single-family homes ranging from historic colonials to modern estates, many with basements, crawl spaces, and attached garages that create rodent entry points. Older homes near Baldwin Place often have fieldstone foundations with gaps that welcome mice and insects. Properties in Heritage Hills and Heritage Estates communities share wooded lot lines where wildlife and carpenter ants thrive. Detached garages, sheds, and pool houses provide secondary nesting sites for wasps and rodents. Multi-acre properties with mature landscaping experience ongoing termite and carpenter ant pressure from decaying wood debris.
commonPestsSection: Somers residents most frequently encounter white-footed mice seeking warmth in fall and winter, often discovered in attics and basements. Carpenter ants emerge from wooded areas in spring, attracted to moisture-damaged wood. Wasps and hornets build nests in eaves and outbuildings during summer months. Raccoons raid garbage bins and establish dens in chimneys or attics. Termites threaten older wooden structures, while ticks proliferate in grassy and wooded areas, making yard treatments essential for families with pets.

faqs.question: How much does pest control cost in Somers?
faqs.answer: General pest control in Somers ranges from $175 to $300 per treatment. Specialized services vary: ant or wasp removal costs $350–$550, mouse or rat extermination runs $350–$600, and bed bug treatment ranges from $1,200 to $3,500. We provide free estimates for all Somers properties and customized plans for recurring service.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a pest emergency in Somers?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency pest control throughout Somers, including Baldwin Place, Heritage Hills, and properties along Routes 100 and 202. Emergency services range from $350 to $1,000 depending on severity and pest type. Our exterminators are familiar with Somers neighborhoods and can typically arrive within hours of your call.

faqs.question: Are your treatments safe for children and pets in Somers homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-registered products with proven safety profiles and follow strict application protocols. Treatments in Somers homes are tailored to your household, with pet- and child-safe options available. We provide clear re-entry instructions and can schedule services when family members are away, ensuring complete peace of mind for your household.

faqs.question: Why do I have carpenter ants in my Somers home?
faqs.answer: Somers' heavily wooded landscape provides ideal carpenter ant habitat. These ants nest in decaying trees and stumps, then migrate indoors seeking moisture-damaged wood in sills, beams, or window frames. Our carpenter ant treatment ($350–$550) includes interior and exterior applications, targeting satellite colonies and the main nest to eliminate the infestation completely.

faqs.question: How do mice enter homes with basements in Somers?
faqs.answer: Mice exploit foundation cracks, utility penetrations, and gaps around basement windows common in Somers' older homes. Fieldstone foundations near Baldwin Place are particularly vulnerable. Our mouse extermination ($350–$600) includes trapping and baiting, while rodent exclusion services ($500–$3,000) seal entry points permanently, preventing future invasions through basements and crawl spaces.

faqs.question: Do you handle wildlife removal near Muscoot Reservoir areas?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive wildlife removal throughout Somers, including areas near Muscoot Reservoir and wooded neighborhoods where raccoons, squirrels, and bats are common. Services range from $900 to $4,000 depending on the animal and situation. We humanely trap and relocate wildlife, then seal entry points to prevent re-entry into your attic or chimney.
